description: Style NoteWe know how addictive the angry birds game can be! Tap into the season's most popular video game trend from your phones and PCs and into your wardrobe, with this soft spun tee from Angry Birds. The imagery is very in-vogue, channeling the spirit of urban chic into your off-duty ensemble. Style this with your tried-and true favourite denims (rolled up to the ankle) with boat shoes, or colour block it with another bright hue and add on a pair of ankle-high boots.Product DetailsWhite ribbed round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmWash inside out, with like coloursDo not bleach or iron on printDry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
